last_completed_step: Phase 3-4 complete: solar/wind/hybrid engines, quality checks, simulate.py orchestrator (caching, versioning, live per-block forecast labelling, run/error logging). 21 unit tests pass. E2E verified vs live API (past/today/future/deep-archive + reprocess): solar specific yield ~4.14 kWh/kWp/day, solar CUF ~26%.
next_action: Phase 5: FastAPI app (app/main.py), 8 endpoints (app/api/routes_plants.py + routes_admin.py), Pydantic schemas, API-key auth dependency (hashed, scope, rate limit, usage logging), data labels on responses.
design_decisions: Site location not present in Book1 (4).xlsx (no lat/long text or coordinates). Per spec, location is a configurable placeholder. Defaulting seed plant to Jaisalmer, Rajasthan, India (lat=26.9124, lon=70.9026, tz=Asia/Kolkata) - a strong solar+wind hybrid region good for realism validation. Override via .env (PLANT_LAT/PLANT_LON/PLANT_TZ) or DB config.
DB: SQLAlchemy with DATABASE_URL; defaults to SQLite (zero-config local) and Postgres in docker-compose. Alembic provides migrations; app also supports create_all bootstrap for SQLite fallback.
Scheduler: APScheduler in-process. Dashboard: FastAPI-served HTML + Chart.js (self-contained, CDN).
Capacities confirmed from workbook: Solar AC=160MW, Solar DC=240MW (DC/AC=1.5), Wind AC=135MW, PPA=140MW, block=15min, 96 blocks/day.

tasks.name: Scaffold, config, DB models, migrations, seed
FastAPI endpoints + auth + rate limit + logging
Scheduler + quality + dashboard + reprocess + key mgmt
Tests + Docker + README + e2e + health report + BUILD_COMPLETE
